ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the restaurant */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the restaurant opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the restaurant closed (if applicable) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the restaurant */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the restaurant */,
  "days_open" TEXT /* Days of the week the restaurant is open */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant where the item is available */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the menu item */,
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the availability status of the menu item */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the menu item */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients in the menu item */,
  "nutritional_info" TEXT /* Additional nutritional information about the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_availability_id FOREIGN KEY ("availability_id") REFERENCES availability ("availability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left (in original format) */,
  "converted_date" INTEGER /* Converted date of the review (in YYYYMMDD format) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant at the time of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image uploaded with the review (if any) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the review (calculated by the system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "facebook_id" TEXT /* Facebook ID of the user (if connected) */,
  "twitter_id" TEXT /* Twitter ID of the user (if connected) */,
  "google_id" TEXT /* Google ID of the user (if connected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_items" (
  "review_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review item */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "item_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the specific menu item */,
  "item_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided for the specific menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_items_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review image */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., food, ambiance, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_images_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability status */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status of the menu item (e.g., Available, Seasonal, Discontinued) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the availability status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, manager, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the role (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, leave review) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_words" (
  "tag_word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag word */,
  "tag_word" TEXT /* The tag word (e.g., 'burger', 'pizza', etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_tags" (
  "menu_item_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item tag */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "tag_word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_tags_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_tags_tag_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_word_id") REFERENCES tag_words ("tag_word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags" (
  "review_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review tag */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review */,
  "tag_word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tags_tag_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_word_id") REFERENCES tag_words ("tag_word_id")
)
